wrong_choice_explanations: 匹 is used for small animals — it doesn't fit here because students are people, not animals.

個 is a general counter for objects — it doesn't fit here because friends are people, not objects.

枚 is used for flat thin objects — it doesn't fit here because friends are people, not flat objects.
